headline: Coming Soon: Spring California Climate Credit to Deliver Energy Bill Savings to PG&E Customers
summary: In April, millions of residential and eligible small business customers will see a California Climate Credit automatically applied to their Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) bill. No action is needed by customers.

raw.headline: Coming Soon: Spring California Climate Credit to Deliver Energy Bill Savings to PG&E Customers
raw.summary: In April, millions of residential and eligible small business customers will see a California Climate Credit automatically applied to their Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) bill. No action is needed by customers.

headline: 5 Low Price-to-Book Stocks to Watch for Strong Returns This April
summary: PagSeguro Digital, Mistras Group, Strategic Education, NatWest and PG&E emerge as low P/B picks with solid growth outlooks and strong value scores.
